arts.ttl: Watford forward given green light to head out on loan
arts.sum: Watford attacker Michael Adu-Poku has joined Solihull Moors on loan, as announced by the non-league side’s official website.… The post Watford forward given green light to head out on loan appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Watford out to 'inflict more pain' on rivals Luton
arts.sum: Watford head coach Tom Cleverley says he wants his side to inflict more pain on struggling Luton in Saturday's derby.

arts.ttl: Officials are named for Luton's Championship clash against fierce rivals Watford
